meta_title: For Founders: debugging with AI to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Finish Your SaaS Project Faster (Checklist)
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your SaaS. Learn how to master debugging with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to overcome development roadblocks and ship your MVP.
content.answer_block: You are stuck because you are debugging manually rather than instrumenting your codebase for AI analysis. By leveraging Antigravity for automated architecture mapping and Claude Code for iterative CLI debugging, you shift from manual 'trial-and-error' to high-velocity resolution, effectively closing the gap between your prototype and a shippable product.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is littered with 'almost-finished' MVPs. You know the feeling: you’re 90% there, but a persistent bug or a complex integration issue has turned your momentum into a stagnant slog. You aren't failing because of a lack of vision; you're failing because your manual debugging process is eating the time you should be spending on customer acquisition.

It is time to stop wrestling with stack traces and start architecting for speed. By treating your codebase as a data set and your AI as a senior engineering partner, you can slash your debugging time by 70%. This isn't just about fixing bugs; it's about reclaiming your runway and shipping before your competition wakes up.

steps.title: Map the Failure Surface
steps.description: Before fixing, isolate the blast radius. Use AI to scan your project structure to identify which module is causing the regression.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and identify the most likely modules causing the recent regression in feature X. Provide a dependency map.

steps.title: Automated Bug Reproduction
steps.description: Create a minimal reproduction script that encapsulates the bug, ensuring the AI has a clear test case to iterate against.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a standalone test script that reproduces the bug found in the checkout flow using existing mock data.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Generate a reproduction script for the login bug and save it as test_bug.py'

steps.title: Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Feed the reproduction script into Claude Code to receive a surgical diagnosis of the underlying logic flaw.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a root cause analysis on the provided error logs. Focus on state management inconsistencies.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Analyze test_bug.py output and identify the specific line causing the state mismatch'

steps.title: Iterative Patching
steps.description: Apply the fix in a sandbox environment and verify it against your current codebase dependencies.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a patch for the identified bug that adheres to our current clean architecture standards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Apply the proposed fix and run the test suite to verify no regressions'

steps.title: Automate Future Regression Checks
steps.description: Convert the bug fix into a permanent automated test to ensure the issue never surfaces again.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a unit test based on the bug fix to prevent future regressions in this module.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Create a new test file in /tests that covers the fix we just implemented'

pro_tips: Always provide the AI with your 'system constraints' file first to prevent it from suggesting libraries you don't use.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to keep track of the specific business logic requirements for your MVP.
When debugging complex state, ask Antigravity to visualize the state transitions as a mermaid.js flowchart.
Never let the AI rewrite the entire file; always request surgical 'diff' patches to keep your git history clean.
If the AI gets stuck, force a 'context reset' by providing a summary of the last 3 successful debugging steps.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is stable, transition from debugging to feature-shipping by setting up an automated CI/CD pipeline that triggers Claude Code for code reviews on every Pull Request.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the strategy, and the roadmap. The only variable left is your execution. Stop letting bugs dictate your launch date and start building like a professional. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
